en: Here you are, Homer. What the? Why are you talking like that?
The play's tomorrow night. I've got to stay in character.
Hey, Mom, would it help if I talk like this, too? It might.
And I'll talk like this. Bob's your uncle, mate. That really doesn't help, Bob.
Big Daddy, would y'all mind passing a little old biscuit?
Can I slug off school tomorrow? Got a pain in me gulliver.
I'm living in a cuckoo clock.
See you later, kids. I've got to go rehearse with Ned.
For God's sakes, you can pull the lid off your own can of pudding.
Ah! Oh, no. My pudding is trapped forever.
So I can open my own can of pudding, can't I?
Hey, Marge! Keep yelling, you big ape.
